name: technology_defense_subcontractor_stonehaven_ind_col
premise: A Technology reliability war-room is in a fast-moving incident involving technology defense subcontractor stonehaven ind col. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is in the next hour. Every delay increases security, uptime, and user rights. Stakeholders are already framing this as individual vs collective under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Noah Okoye
agents.identity: I am Noah Okoye, accountable for a defensible call in Technology when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays collective for individual.

agents.name: Elena Berg
agents.identity: I am Elena Berg, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Technology.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so collective isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of individual.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect collective.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to collective to secure individual under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is in the next hour. Evidence is partial. Noah Okoye must decide under individual vs collective. What does Noah Okoye do?
